response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience and has contributed to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks direct experience with multi-agent systems in production, fintech infrastructure, or regulated environments. His background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures is strong, but the resume does not highlight leadership scaling engineering teams to 10+ people or hands-on experience with real-time credit-risk, liquidity optimization, or compliance infrastructure. The agentic AI work appears limited to developer tooling rather than commercial systems.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time applications (e.g., GISCollective, Sociomantic)
Experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators, frameworks)
Proven track record in scaling engineering teams and improving development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No explicit experience with multi-agent AI systems in a commercial, production environment
Lacks direct fintech or regulated-environment experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, compliance)
No demonstrated leadership scaling engineering teams beyond small groups or clear ownership models for large systems
